name: beijing-youth-ai-registration-site
description: Front/back-end separated local prototype for the Beijing Youth AI Academy international AI challenge registration website.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@ai-registration/shared && npm run build --workspace=@ai-registration/public-site && npm run build --workspace=@ai-registration/admin-console
scripts.verify: npm run check:structure && npm run test:backend && npm run build
